tracks.title: Advanced Quantum Machine Learning
tracks.description: Master cutting-edge quantum machine learning techniques including advanced variational methods, quantum reservoir computing, quantum Boltzmann machines, quantum GANs, quantum reinforcement learning, quantum natural gradient optimization, error mitigation strategies, quantum transfer learning, quantum federated learning, and near-term NISQ applications.

tracks.title: Quantum Finance
tracks.description: Master the application of quantum computing to financial problems including portfolio optimization, risk analysis, option pricing, Monte Carlo methods, credit scoring, fraud detection, algorithmic trading, and derivatives pricing. Learn to leverage quantum algorithms for competitive advantages in financial markets.

lessons.title: Modern Portfolio Theory: The Markowitz Framework
Value at Risk and Conditional Value at Risk

tracks.title: Quantum Networking
tracks.description: Master the principles and technologies of quantum networking, from fundamental concepts to advanced infrastructure. Learn about quantum key distribution protocols, entanglement distribution, quantum repeaters, and the emerging quantum internet architecture.
